_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin deficiency-associated transcriptional dysregulation suggests a novel therapy for tibial pseudoarthrosis in NF1.

_contextSnippet: This analysis identified 258 genes with differential expression associated with bi-allelic NF1 inactivation
details: Successfully performed RNA-seq analysis identifying 258 genes with differential expression associated with bi-allelic NF1 inactivation
